II.4  ETHICAL GUIDELINES AND LIMITATIONS
APPLICATION
Diffusion-NPO enhances model outputs by steeri
sults, aligning with responsible AI principles. To
lines must be observed:
• Preventing Malicious Use: Diffusion-NPO mu
reducing harm, with safeguards against generati
• Transparent Disclosure:  Its implementation s
accountability, especially in sensitive domains.
• Ethical Oversight: Regular audits and ethical r
quences to ensure responsible use.
• Focused Scope: Diffusion-NPO should be ap
overfitting and maintain broad applicability.
By adhering to these principles, Diffusion-NPO ca
AI standards while minimizing risks.
